recommendations.title: Jiu Jitsu
recommendations.overview: Every six years, an ancient order of jiu-jitsu fighters joins forces to battle a vicious race of alien invaders. But when a celebrated war hero goes down in defeat, the fate of the planet and mankind hangs in the balance.

recommendations.title: Jules
recommendations.overview: A flying saucer lands in the backyard of an elderly suburbanite with memory problems, who forms a bond with the scared alien inside.

recommendations.title: The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension
recommendations.overview: Adventurer/surgeon/rock musician Buckaroo Banzai and his band of men, the Hong Kong Cavaliers, take on evil alien invaders from the 8th dimension.

recommendations.title: The Human Race
recommendations.overview: A cancer survivor, an amputee, several immigrants, and many others are snatched from a Los Angeles street and forced to take part in a deadly race.

recommendations.title: Krull
recommendations.overview: A prince and a fellowship of companions set out to rescue his bride from a fortress of alien invaders who have arrived on their home planet.

recommendations.title: Occupation: Rainfall
recommendations.overview: Two years into an intergalactic invasion of Earth, survivors in Sydney, Australia, fight back in a desperate ground war. As casualties mount by the day, the resistance and their unexpected allies, uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decis

recommendations.title: Megalodon
recommendations.genres: Action, Science Fiction, Horror, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A military vessel on the search for an unidentified submersible finds themselves face to face with a giant shark, forced to use only what they have on board to defend themselves from the monstrous beast.

recommendations.title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture
recommendations.overview: When an unidentified alien destroys three powerful Klingon cruisers, Captain James T. Kirk returns to the newly transformed U.S.S. Enterprise to take command.

recommendations.title: Right at Your Door
recommendations.overview: A dirty bomb goes off in Los Angeles, jamming freeways and spreading a toxic cloud.

recommendations.title: Alien Nation
recommendations.overview: A few years from now, Earth will have the first contact with an alien civilization. These aliens, known as Newcomers, slowly begin to be integrated into human society after years of quarantine.
